known_limitations.description: Real topology extraction requires CadQuery backend (--backend occ); mock topology available for testing
No automatic feature recognition; only geometry imported
Design intent and constraints not extracted from STEP

notes: L1: Import-only adapter; stores STEP as-is without semantic extraction

known_limitations.description: Linear static structural analysis only; nonlinear, transient, thermal not supported
Mesh information extracted but not validated for quality
Material property precision may drift in roundtrip

notes: L3: Structured mapping of CAE setup to .aieng; known-only extraction with explicit unknowns

known_limitations.description: Only numeric marker detection and known observations extracted; full mesh solution not parsed
No automatic verification status update; import is evidence-only

notes: L4: Validated evidence recording with explicit unknown handling; produces deterministic output per input

known_limitations.description: Element and node count recorded; quality metrics (skew, aspect ratio) not computed

notes: L4: Mesh summary evidence with explicit quality unknowns; deterministic input-to-output mapping

known_limitations.description: Deck is scaffold only; meshing must be done externally with Gmsh or other tool
Exported deck is not automatically validated with CalculiX

notes: L3: Generates CalculiX input deck scaffold from .aieng simulation setup; external tool validates execution

known_limitations.description: No geometry update; only material/BC/load parameters from updated setup.yaml

notes: L2: Partial extraction; regenerates deck from simulation/setup.yaml without full semantic validation

known_limitations.description: Does not execute external tools; records only what caller provides

notes: L4: Deterministic, schema-validated provenance recording; explicit validation of required fields

known_limitations.description: Records evidence references; does not validate external tool execution

notes: L4: Evidence ledger management with deterministic ID generation and cross-reference validation
